name: Machtblick Bundestag agent skills
description: Assistant-facing discovery for public Bundestag transparency data.

skills.name: Find Bundestag votes
skills.description: Use the vote index and vote detail pages to answer questions about Bundestag votes and voting behavior.

skills.name: Find Bundestag members
skills.description: Use member pages and the member index to answer questions about members, parties, votes, speeches, and motions.

skills.name: Find Bundestag motions
skills.description: Use motion pages, JSON alternates, and the sitemap to answer questions about motions and proposals.
